name: Jeff Beck
abstract: Geoffrey Arnold Beck (24 June 1944 – 10 January 2023) was an English guitarist. He rose to prominence as a member of the rock band the Yardbirds, and afterwards founded and fronted the Jeff Beck Group and Beck, Bogert & Appice.

concerts.label: Midnight Performance: The Jeff Beck Group
Rainforest Foundation Benefit Concert
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Charles Mingus
about_quotes.evidence: Jeff Beck, that's the one that sold, isn't it? ... Is Jeff Beck a guitar player?
